Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Request Task Create two POWL models based on a provided text description of a hiring process at GlobalTeq Solutions Context The hiring process involves screening assessments cultural fit and final decisions There is a specific bias risk in the Cultural Fit and Community Affiliation Check stage where local affiliations or specific club memberships give an advantage Model 1 Unfair Must include an XOR branch where one path involves a CommunityAffiliationCheck that gives an advantage unfairness while the other is a standard CulturalFitCheck Model 2 Fair Must represent the same overall process but remove the bias source All applicants undergo the same cultural fit evaluation no selective XOR branch based on affiliation Format Use Python code with pm4py library constructs Transition SilentTransition OperatorPOWL StrictPartialOrder Operator Specific Operators XOR choice LOOP iteration for data completeness PO partial order sequence Activity Labels Use specific labels from the text

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Deconstruct the Process for Model 1 Unfair Start ReceiveApplication Loop DataCompletenessCheck If missing info RequestMoreInfo Loop back If complete Exit loop POWL Loop structure A DataCompletenessCheck B RequestMoreInfo So loop equals OperatorPOWL operator Operator LOOP children DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo Sequence After loop do SkillAssessment XOR Branch After SkillAssessment there is a choice based on hidden criteria Branch 1 Standard CulturalFitCheck Branch 2 Affiliated Local CommunityAffiliationCheck POWL XOR structure XOR CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck Sequence After the XOR branch do ManagerialReview Sequence After ManagerialReview do FinalDecision PO Structure Connect these stages sequentially

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Refining the Loop The text says Any missing information triggers a loop In POWL A B A is executed then decision to exit or do B This fits Refining the XOR The text says This step is often an XOR choice either you go through a standard cultural fit assessment or you take a path where community affiliation leads to implicit score adjustments This maps directly to XOR CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Deconstruct the Process for Model 2 Fair Start ReceiveApplication Loop Same as Model 1 DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo Sequence SkillAssessment No XOR Bias Instead of XOR CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck just CulturalFitCheck Sequence ManagerialReview Sequence FinalDecision PO Structure Connect these sequentially

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND

Text: Correction on Loop Syntax The prompt says A B means execute A then either exit the loop or execute B and then A again So children DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo fits the description
